articles.title: Inflation, Interest Rates, and Bitcoin: What Traders Are Watching
articles.description: A significant week awaits the cryptocurrency market, with incoming Consumer Price Index (CPI) data and Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) interest rate decisions. Michaël van de Poppe, founder of MN Trading, emphasizes the importance of these events for market dynamics. Bitcoin and cryptocurrency markets have historically reacted to economic announcements. articles.title: BODEN Solana Meme Coins Soar on Hunter Biden Guilty Verdict
articles.description: Hunter Biden was found guilty on three felony gun charges Tuesday—and Solana meme coins inspired by the Bidens pumped afterwards.

articles.title: Cardano Founder Charles Hoskinson Teases Major Change For ADA – Here’s What We Know
articles.description: The Cardano Chang hard fork is finally within reach, promising historic changes for the blockchain. Cardano To Record Historic Moment With Chang Hard Fork In an X (formerly Twitter) post on June 9, Hoskinson announced the imminent release […]

articles.title: Cardano About To Witness ‘Most Significant Milestone’ As It Gears Up for Chang Hard Fork: Charles Hoskinson
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) co-founder Charles Hoskinson is outlining the timeline for the layer-1 blockchain’s Voltaire phase, the fifth stage of the 11th-largest crypto asset’s roadmap. Hoskinson says that a new Cardano node which will usher in two Chang upgrades is ready for deployment. The first Chang upgrade, Chang Upgrade 1, will introduce governance features on Cardano […]
